landing.title: Rainbow | Fun, powerful, and secure crypto wallets
landing.text:
Rainbow | Fun, powerful, and secure crypto wallets
Get Support
Updates
Learn
Download
Experience Crypto in Color
Fun, powerful, and secure wallets for everyday use
Download Rainbow Extension
Download Rainbow Mobile
Rainbow Extension. Built for speed. Built for power. Built for You.
Download Rainbow Extension
Available in your favorite browsers
Move faster with keyboard shortcuts
Leave your mouse at home
A flow state experience for quick and versatile onchain actions - just press ⌘K and type your command.
K
Magic Menu
1
Switch your wallet
X
Swap
S
Send
W
Wallets
Effortlessly manage hundreds of wallets
Import and organize
Switch and reorder wallets
Send
Manage NFTs
Swap & Bridge
Watch & Impersonate wallets
Import and organize
Switch and reorder wallets
Send
Manage NFTs

Send
Manage NFTs
Swap & Bridge
Watch & Impersonate wallets
All the chains that matter in one place
One convenient interface
tailored for you
Impersonation mode
Use any wallet in read-only mode with just an address
Hardware wallets
Do anything with Ledger & Trezor from Rainbow
All the L2s
Tokens, activity details, and NFTs for the L2s that matter
Secure
Leverages the latest extension standards for your safety and security
NFTs
See your collections, access market data, & trade
Custom RPCs
Add any EVM chain
Swap and bridge It just works
Cross-chain swaps, endless DEX and bridge liquidity, and Flashbots protection from sandwich attacks and MEV.
Always the best available price
What you see is what you get
The best way to experience NFTs
See and organize all your NFTs across all Ethereum chains on mobile and desktop.
All the media formats
All the chains that matter
Controlled by you Supported by us
You are in full control of your funds, and we never have access to your private keys. But if you need support, we're here for you.
Global support team 24/7
Thanks for responding within 4 minutes & assisting w/ incredible customer service!
Best and fastest customer service in in web3 even better then so many web2 companies
best support by far
Gotta say, @rainbowdotme is probably the wallet I’d recommend to new users. super easy to use, great design, and solid customer service 👌
How is your support so f*ing good?
Onchain On-the-Go. Ethereum in your pocket.
Download Rainbow Mobile
Available on iOS and Android
Get notified about what matters most
Know what happens the instant it’s confirmed onchain. Customize the alerts you receive, from the type of transaction to the individual wallets you watch.
Find the money that might be waiting for you
See and accept all of your NFT offers inside Rainbow.

As seen in

Soak in the sun and stream tunes all onchain summer directly from your Rainbow Wallet
Bow, the Rainbow Fini
A special edition Rainbow Finiliar friend that keeps you up to date with the gas prices
Rainbow World
Generative. Interactive. Customizable. Bring your Citizen to life in Rainbow World.

changelog.title: Updates and Release notes | Rainbow
changelog.text:
Updates and Release notes | Rainbow
Get Support
Updates
Learn
Download
Updates
Discover the latest features and changes in Rainbow.
Follow us on Twitter
·
Follow on Farcaster
Sep 23, 2024
Bug fixes and performance improvements
Fixes & improvements
App
v.1.9.39
Improved
Rainbow Swaps have seen a performance improvement — we dusted off a couple cobwebs (the TL;DR is they're faster now) and made swapping even smoother 🌈
Fixed
Fixed an issue with charts where it was using USD for points instead of user’s selected currency
Fixed an issue where asset balances weren't updating correctly
Fixed an issue on Android nav bar where it was covered by the systems navigation bar
Fixed an issue with opacity when signing a transaction from Warpcast / via MWP
Fixed a crash that happened when searching for an input token in swaps
Fixed and issue with degen native asset address
This fixed degen ↔ wdegen!
Fixed a bug on iOS 18 which caused context menu dismissals
Fixed a crash that was happening when sending tokens
Fixed a bug where the paste button was disabled when swapping on android devices
Fixed an issue where deleting a contact would cause loading issues on send flow
Full release notes ->
Sep 12, 2024
Degen Mode Swaps and Farcaster integration!
New features
App
v.1.9.38
Two updates in once
You can now turn Degen Mode on in Swaps to skip the review step and ape as fast as possible. Plus Rainbow is compatible with
all
mobile transactions on Warpcast with the addition of MWP!
Full release notes ->
Aug 26, 2024
See popular tokens and navigate with ease!
New features
App
v.1.9.36
Popular token suggestions
Now when you open Swaps you'll see a list of suggested tokens that are popular with other Rainbow users! It's your choice whether you ape in with them or not though…
Full release notes ->
Aug 5, 2024
Open in Rainbow, recent swaps, and more swap love
New features
App
v.1.9.34
Open links in Rainbow
You can click share → “Open in Rainbow” (or tap the app icon) to open a link in the Rainbow in-app browser! It's available everywhere, so use it from your favorite browsers or social apps.
Swaps are now even smoother
Tap to max
Hold to swap
Recent swaps shortcuts
Copy and paste swap
Full release notes ->
Jul 24, 2024
It's App Fixes in July!
Fixes & improvements
App
v1.9.32
Fixes
Fixed a crash involving prompt codes.
Fixed an issue with the keyboard dismissing the option to copy a contract address or view on Etherscan from the swaps search page.
Fixed a bug where changing the output asset on swaps lead to an incorrect state.
Full release notes ->
Jul 12, 2024
Swaps v2 has arrived!
New features
Our new and improved swaps is here! Learn more about Swaps v2 in Rainbow for a greater mobile experience.
Read more ->
Jun 25, 2024
Rainbow Rewards!
Points drop
Phase 1 of our Rainbow Points program is here with Rainbow Rewards! Learn more about Rainbow Rewards and the best way to stack and convert into ETH!
Read more ->
Jun 8, 2024
Find tokens even easier in Swaps
Fixes & improvements
Extension
v1.4.122
Improved
You can now search for a Token Contract Address in Swaps to more quickly find a token
Fixes
Resolved gas estimation issues for Blast and Degen chain
Fixed the
To
field in Activity Details for a transaction to better reflect a transaction recipient
Resolved
NaN
balances displayed on the Tokens tab while reloading balances
Fixed text overflows for alternative languages on the Tip Banner on the Tokens tab
Full release notes ->
Jun 5, 2024
June refresh has landed
Fixes & improvements
App
v1.9.25
Fixes
Fixed a bug where incorrect data would show in pending transactions
Fixed a bug where a swap warning flashed when including a
large
number
Full release notes ->
May 30, 2024
Weekly fixes and polish
Fixes & improvements
App
v1.9.24
Fixes
Fixed a bug where some mints with an unknown price were showing as free
Fixed issues with certain NFTs causing crashes on some wallets
Fixed an issue where the Buy ETH button/option would show when the selected wallet already had ETH
Full release notes ->
May 29, 2024
Token contract address search
Fixes & improvements
Extension
v1.4.111
Improved
You can now search for Token Contract Addresses in the Magic Menu with Cmd+K to easily find and get an asset
Fixes
Resolved accuracy of Ethereum Sepolia and additional testnet gas estimates
Fixed a crash for some browsers that attempted to translate the Onboarding flow
Full release notes ->
May 17, 2024
Meet Rainbow’s Onchain Browser
New features
App
v1.9.23
Meet Rainbow’s Onchain Browser
Onchain Browser is the best mobile experience for exploring and transacting onchain. It’s a big step in the evolution of Rainbow and one of many important upgrades coming this month.
The Onchain Browser makes Rainbow
faster
,
smoother
,
safer
and more
reliable
.
Try it and earn extra points for interacting with dapps on the Onchain Browser. You’ll never want (or have) to leave Rainbow again 🫠🌈
Full release notes ->
May 16, 2024
Manage Contacts, and Instantly Bridge
New features
Extension
v1.4.97
New
You can now add, remove, and manage Contacts in the Magic Menu with Cmd+K
Instant bridging routes are now available in Rainbow for many core tokens and networks via the Relay Protocol
Improved
Search result priority ordering improvements in the Magic Menu for commands, tokens, and more
Improved translation coverage for the Magic Menu
Fixes
Resolved an issue where pending transactions could visually overlap in Activity
Blocking auto-translation attempts in some browsers while interacting with your Secret Recovery Phrase
Fixed an issue with
ESC
keyboard dismissals for the Token Details card
Fixed an issue for some dApps like Etherscan that required triggering a connection request upon switching networks
Resolved interaction consistency with right-click menus and action menus in NFT Details
Full release notes ->
May 1, 2024
Better slippage, Points hotkeys, and more
Fixes & improvements
Extension
v1.4.81
Improved
More reliable and accurate slippage threshold estimates are now available for Swaps
You can now navigate the Points dashboard and Weekly Drops with your Keyboard
Fixes
Resolved issues for users that experienced a missing RPC and failed transactions on Degen Chain L3
Fixed an issue where Speed up and Cancel transaction would not appear in the Activity list
Improved Ledger connection reliability to reduce signing timeouts
Resolved a UI display issue when Signing transactions for Hardware Wallets
Fixed text overflows for long wallet names on dApp Connection prompts and Transaction Previews
Improved performance when launching Activity Details for a transaction
Fixed shortcuts handling on the Backup Reminders and added
esc
dismissal
Full release notes ->
Apr 24, 2024
Aggregate balances, better Swaps
Fixes & improvements
App
v1.9.22
Improved
Rainbow now displays your total USD balance for your wallet inside of the Wallet Switcher and Send instead of
just
ETH balances. Even better for L2s!
Fixes
Improved quote reliability for Swaps
Fixed a crash when swapping ProxySwap on Degen Chain
Minor copy update when using Send for an L2 network
Something new is coming soon for Swaps
🤫
Full release notes ->
Apr 24, 2024
Add even more Custom Networks to Rainbow
Fixes & improvements
Extension
v1.4.73
Improved
Added autofill support for Redstone and Rootstock networks in the Add Network flow
Fixes
Resolved duplicate instances of tokens like
DEGEN
when Rainbow introduces rich metadata for a new network
Resolved a white flash on launch for users in dark mode
Improved quote price estimates for Swaps on Degen Chain
Full release notes ->
Apr 23, 2024
2x Points for Degens
Points drop
Earn
2x Points
on all transactions on Degen Chain this week. Trade and manage your Degen Chain tokens and NFTs using Rainbow!
Read more ->
Apr 18, 2024
Rainbow x Degen Chain
Network supported
Rainbow now fully supports Degen Chain across the app and extension
💰  View and Send your $DEGEN balances
🔀  Trade on Degen Chain with Swaps
🖥️  Connect to
Degen.tips
to Bridge and Claim your tips
🎩  Turn content into currency with Degen x Rainbow
Read more ->
Apr 17, 2024
April refresh has landed
Network supported
App
v1.9.21
New
Added full support for Degen Chain, including sending, swapping, and connecting to dApps with WalletConnect
Improved
You can now see price estimates in your preferred currency for simulations in the Transaction Preview sheet
You'll now see warning in Swaps when the quote's price impact is unknown
You'll also now see a warning in Send when attempting to send assets to a contract address
Fixes
Improved WalletConnect pairing flow reliability and improved telemetry to diagnose additional issues
Improved error handling on Web Profile preferences to mitigate crashes when hiding NFTs or organizing your Showcase
Fixed an unintentional scroll when dismissing Promotional cards on Discover
Fixed a bug where some NFTs wouldn't show up in your gallery
Fixed an bug where non-backed up wallets would show as backed up under certain conditions
Fixed pairing metadata display issues for Zora mints
Full release notes ->
Apr 17, 2024
Find your POAPs in the Gallery
New features
Extension
v1.4.65
New
Your POAP collection is now available in the NFT Gallery
Degen Chain is now fully supported in Rainbow. Send, Swap, and interact with Degen dApps with Rainbow
Improved
You'll now see USD or preferable currency estimates for each Transaction Preview, so that you can at a glance understand the real cost of a transaction
Enabled Transaction Previews and simulation for Contract deployments
It's now even easier to Speed up and Cancel a transaction
Shortcuts on now supported for the Token Details menus
Fixes
Resolved an issue where Zora Chain would be unavailable for a subset of users after an extension upgrade
Now hiding Transaction Simulation tabs when no result is available
You'll now see a warning when Rainbow is missing asset prices for an attempted Swap
Fixed an issue where transactions could appear for disabled networks in the Activity list
Fixed an issue where dApp requests to switch chain may fail after adding a new network or RPC
Fixed balance resolution for Custom Networks to properly display Transaction Previews instead of gas top-up requests
Fixed dApp connection network badge positioning
Fixed Transaction Preview network badge size
Fixed double click text selection in Custom Gas gwei input fields
Fixed currency pass-through in Transaction Previews so that you'll always see your preferred currency denomination
Fixed UI for when a simulation balance and price is unavailable in Transaction Previews
Full release notes ->
Apr 9, 2024
Blast support is here
Network supported
Rainbow now supports Blast as a first class network!
Bridge to
@Blast_L2
today, explore the ecosystem and start earning native yield on ETH & stablecoins!
In Rainbow, Blast is automatically enabled and treated like all other networks. This means you can:
Swap
and
trade
directly in Rainbow, with colorful charts and data
Track
all your token and NFTs automatically (don’t worry about manually adding)
Manage
and
showcase
your Blast NFTs
Bridge
to-and-from Blast directly in Rainbow
Connect
and
interact
with dapps across the Blast ecosystem
Double dip on Points
Read more ->
Apr 8, 2024
Spring cleaning & polishing
Fixes & improvements
Extension
v1.4.55
Fixes
Fixed an issue with balance estimation during Sends on Polygon and BSC
Now showing the right transaction explorer in the right-click menu on Activity
Fixed an issue that hid failed transactions from the Activity list
Resolved transaction display settlement issues after performing a Swap, to prevent incorrect transaction types from being displayed
Improved currency display values in Activity Details for each transaction
Resolved cell highlight rounding issues on the Settings menu when navigating with your keyboard
Resolved missing asset icons in the Activity list
Full release notes ->
Apr 2, 2024
Revamped Backups at last
New features
App
v1.9.20
New
Backups are more reliable than ever with a completely redesigned Backup flow. Ensure your Secret Recovery Phrases are backed up today and try it out in Settings
Improved
Added a pending transaction indicator on the tab bar when transactions are being broadcast
Fixes
Resolved an issue where
$Nan
may appear in the Transaction Details sheet, and improved speed and reliability
Improved NFT Offers and Mints gas estimations and success rates using simulations
Properly refetching balances after a transaction is confirmed to ensure accurate balances
Fixed token metadata display issues when searching by contract address in Discover
Hiding favorite buttons for non-Mainnet assets
Fixed a crash when tapping the Settings button
Improved WalletConnect v2 sessions telemetry for user diagnostics
Full release notes ->
Apr 2, 2024
Referral Week!
Points drop
Referral week is here once again! When a friend you invite to Rainbow has made $10 in cumulative Swap volume, you
will start earning 10% of all of their Rainbow Points
from their activity in Rainbow.
Refer your friends to Rainbow this week and earn 2x Points on all your activity as well as the wallets’ that you referred.
Referring people to Rainbow is the best way to earn Rainbow Points!
Read more ->
Oct 11, 2023
Bridging and Testnets
New features
Extension
v1.2.39
Bridging
Bridging is easier than ever when right-clicking on a token or choosing to Bridge from the Token Details pane
Testnets
You can now connect to all major Testnets for Rainbow's supported networks to sign and send testnet transactions. When connecting to or switching networks from a dApp that supports Testnets, you'll automatically be connected to the correct testnet by default, without needing to manage an RPC or network list.
Full release notes ->

docs.title: Rainbow Learn
docs.text:
Rainbow Learn
🌈 Download Rainbow
Search
⌘
K
Rainbow Learn
Rainbow is a fun, simple, and secure way to create an Ethereum wallet, collect NFTs, and explore the new world of Web3.
👇
On this page you’ll find guides and educational resources that will help you navigate the world of Web3 and Ethereum.
To check out our support resources, head to
rainbow.me/support
To download the Rainbow App or Extension, head to
rainbow.me/download
If you have any questions, reach out via email at:
hello@rainbow.me
or DM us on X:
@rainbowdotme
Click the  🔍  at the top right of this page to find what you need!
Learn more about Crypto, Ethereum, and Web3:

hits.title: Turbo, an Improved Rainbow Colormap for Visualization
Ask HN: Why don't I see gold at the end of the remote working rainbow?
Show HN: Rainbow – an attempt to display colour on a B&W monitor
“Reading Rainbow” was created to combat summer reading slumps
Rainbow Six Vegas, SWAT 4 unplayable due to disabled ad server

analysis.name: Rainbow
analysis.value_proposition: A fun, visually-polished self-custody crypto wallet for Ethereum and EVM chains, available as a mobile app and browser extension with built-in swap, bridge, and NFT management.
analysis.ideal_customer: Crypto-native individuals and newcomers wanting a beautiful, easy-to-use self-custody wallet for everyday Ethereum and L2 interactions including DeFi and NFTs.

features.name: magic menu (⌘k)
features.description: Keyboard-driven command palette for quick wallet actions like swap, send, and wallet switching.
features.evidence_quote: A flow state experience for quick and versatile onchain actions - just press ⌘K and type your command.

features.name: multi-wallet management
features.description: Import, organize, switch, and reorder hundreds of wallets from a single interface.
features.evidence_quote: Effortlessly manage hundreds of wallets — Import and organize, Switch and reorder wallets

features.name: wallet import
features.description: Import existing wallets via seed phrase or private key.
features.evidence_quote: Import and organize

features.name: send tokens
features.description: Send ERC-20 tokens and native assets across supported chains.
features.evidence_quote: Send

features.name: swap
features.description: In-app token swaps aggregating DEX liquidity across chains.
features.evidence_quote: Cross-chain swaps, endless DEX and bridge liquidity

features.name: cross-chain bridge
features.description: Bridge tokens across EVM chains with instant bridging routes via Relay Protocol.
features.evidence_quote: Instant bridging routes are now available in Rainbow for many core tokens and networks via the Relay Protocol

features.name: flashbots / mev protection
features.description: Flashbots protection against sandwich attacks and MEV on swaps.
features.evidence_quote: Flashbots protection from sandwich attacks and MEV.

features.name: watch wallet / impersonation mode
features.description: Load any wallet address in read-only mode to inspect holdings and simulate actions.
features.evidence_quote: Impersonation mode — Use any wallet in read-only mode with just an address

features.name: nft management
features.description: View, organize, and trade NFT collections across all Ethereum chains.
features.evidence_quote: See your collections, access market data, & trade

features.name: nft offers inbox
features.description: See and accept all incoming NFT offers in one place.
features.evidence_quote: See and accept all of your NFT offers inside Rainbow.

features.name: hardware wallet support
features.description: Full functionality with Ledger and Trezor hardware wallets.
features.evidence_quote: Do anything with Ledger & Trezor from Rainbow

features.name: custom rpc
features.description: Add any EVM-compatible chain via custom RPC endpoint.
features.evidence_quote: Custom RPCs — Add any EVM chain

features.name: multi-chain support (l2s)
features.description: Native support for major L2s including Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Blast, Degen chain, and more.
features.evidence_quote: All the chains that matter in one place — All the L2s

features.name: self-custody
features.description: Non-custodial wallet; Rainbow never has access to user private keys.
features.evidence_quote: You are in full control of your funds, and we never have access to your private keys.

features.name: 24/7 customer support
features.description: Global support team available around the clock.
features.evidence_quote: Global support team 24/7

features.name: push notifications / transaction alerts
features.description: Customizable onchain transaction alerts per wallet and transaction type.
features.evidence_quote: Know what happens the instant it's confirmed onchain. Customize the alerts you receive

features.name: ens profile management
features.description: Set up and manage ENS profiles directly in the app.
features.evidence_quote: The best way to set up your ENS profile

features.name: onchain in-app browser
features.description: Built-in browser for exploring and transacting with dapps without leaving Rainbow.
features.evidence_quote: Onchain Browser is the best mobile experience for exploring and transacting onchain.

features.name: degen mode swaps
features.description: Skip swap review step to execute trades instantly for speed-focused users.
features.evidence_quote: You can now turn Degen Mode on in Swaps to skip the review step and ape as fast as possible.

features.name: farcaster / warpcast integration
features.description: Full mobile wallet protocol (MWP) compatibility for signing transactions from Warpcast.
features.evidence_quote: Rainbow is compatible with all mobile transactions on Warpcast with the addition of MWP!

features.name: popular token suggestions
features.description: Surfaced trending tokens in the swap interface based on other Rainbow users' activity.
features.evidence_quote: Now when you open Swaps you'll see a list of suggested tokens that are popular with other Rainbow users!

features.name: recent swaps shortcuts
features.description: Quick-access shortcuts to re-execute recent swap pairs.
features.evidence_quote: Recent swaps shortcuts

features.name: token contract address search
features.description: Search for tokens by contract address in swaps and magic menu.
features.evidence_quote: You can now search for a Token Contract Address in Swaps to more quickly find a token

features.name: contact management
features.description: Add, remove, and manage named contacts for sending.
features.evidence_quote: You can now add, remove, and manage Contacts in the Magic Menu with Cmd+K

features.name: rainbow rewards / points program
features.description: Onchain loyalty points program with rewards convertible to ETH.
features.evidence_quote: Phase 1 of our Rainbow Points program is here with Rainbow Rewards! ...best way to stack and convert into ETH!

features.name: rainbowkit
features.description: Open-source developer SDK for adding wallet connection UX to dapps.
features.evidence_quote: 🧰 rainbowkit

features.name: walletconnect v2 support
features.description: Connect to dapps via WalletConnect v2 protocol.
features.evidence_quote: What is WalletConnect v2?

features.name: buy crypto
features.description: Purchase crypto directly inside the wallet.
features.evidence_quote: 🏦 Buying Crypto with Rainbow

features.name: mobile app (ios and android)
features.description: Native mobile wallet available on both iOS and Android.
features.evidence_quote: Available on iOS and Android

features.name: browser extension
features.description: Wallet extension available for major browsers (Chrome, etc.).
features.evidence_quote: Available in your favorite browsers

features.name: slippage control
features.description: Configurable and auto-estimated slippage tolerance on swaps.
features.evidence_quote: More reliable and accurate slippage threshold estimates are now

features.name: nft media format support
features.description: Renders all NFT media formats across all supported Ethereum chains.
features.evidence_quote: All the media formats — All the chains that matter

features.name: activity feed
features.description: Transaction history with detailed activity and recipient info.
features.evidence_quote: Fixed the To field in Activity Details for a transaction to better reflect a transaction recipient

features.name: open in rainbow (universal link)
features.description: Share links that open directly in the Rainbow in-app browser from external apps.
features.evidence_quote: You can click share → "Open in Rainbow" to open a link in the Rainbow in-app browser!

features.name: beginner education / learn hub
features.description: In-app and web guides for crypto, NFTs, L2s, gas fees, and Web3 concepts.
features.evidence_quote: On this page you'll find guides and educational resources that will help you navigate Web3 and Ethereum.

differentiators: Flashbots MEV/sandwich attack protection built into every swap
Impersonation mode — watch any wallet in read-only mode
Magic Menu (⌘K) keyboard-first command palette for speed
24/7 live customer support, consistently praised as best in web3
Onchain in-app browser with dapp transaction support
Visual-first design and UX polish positioning it as the 'fun' crypto wallet

recent_ships.what: Degen Mode Swaps and Farcaster/Warpcast MWP integration
recent_ships.source: You can now turn Degen Mode on in Swaps to skip the review step and ape as fast as possible.
Now when you open Swaps you'll see a list of suggested tokens that are popular with other Rainbow users!

recent_ships.what: Open in Rainbow universal link / in-app browser deep link
recent_ships.source: You can click share → "Open in Rainbow" to open a link in the Rainbow in-app browser!

recent_ships.what: Swaps v2 — rebuilt mobile swap experience
recent_ships.source: Our new and improved swaps is here! Learn more about Swaps v2 in Rainbow for a greater mobile experience.
Phase 1 of our Rainbow Points program is here with Rainbow Rewards!

recent_ships.what: Token contract address search in extension
recent_ships.source: You can now search for a Token Contract Address in Swaps to more quickly find a token

recent_ships.what: Onchain Browser launched in mobile app
recent_ships.source: Onchain Browser is the best mobile experience for exploring and transacting onchain.

recent_ships.what: Contact management and instant bridging via Relay Protocol in extension
recent_ships.source: You can now add, remove, and manage Contacts in the Magic Menu with Cmd+K; Instant bridging routes now available via the Relay Protocol

praised: Fast customer support: 'Thanks for responding within 4 minutes & assisting w/ incredible customer service!'
'Best and fastest customer service in web3 even better than so many web2 companies'
Recommended for new users: 'super easy to use, great design, and solid customer service'
'How is your support so f*ing good?'

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Full wallet, swap, bridge, NFT, multi-chain — all features appear free

pricing.notes: No paid tiers found in any source. Rainbow appears entirely free to end users; revenue model likely via swap/bridge fees embedded in quotes. RainbowKit (developer SDK) is open-source.

PCs That Never Made It, Chapter 20 – Dec Rainbow, TI Professional, Victor 9000 [video]
